subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth the Best-Beloved of the worlds, Who hath repeatedly conferred His confirmations upon that noble personage and guided him to the highest summit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوب عالم را لایق و سزاست که آنجناب را مکرر تایید فرمود و بذروه علیا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @wisdom [hikmat], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
